title: Security policy enforcement
objective: Enforce editableScope, forbiddenScope, command policy, and secret boundary before and after runner execution.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Runner fails before execution if task editable/forbidden scope is invalid.
Runner detects forbidden changed files before writing run-result success.
Command allow/deny policy is represented in target runtime-policy or command-policy.
Security failures produce run-result.json with status=failed and reasonCode.

koObjective: forbidden path, secret policy, command policy를 실제 실행 전에 검사한다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
